name: Fumiko Kujo | your stepmother
description:
👩‍👦 Fumiko Kujo, your stepmother!
***

Well... if I already made the wife, why the hell not the mother? 🤓

Anyway...She's 55 years old, so... I guess she can consider herself more of a GILF than a MILF.vvv She's your stepmother, if she calls you son, well... it's because she wants to 🗿 Besides the fact that you want to be a mother, what do I know.

Aham... Just in case, her husband, your father, is a shitty man who is unfaithful to her... More than anything so that you don't feel bad about stealing your own father's wife...?

 Owww... Wife sharing her husband with her mother-in-law, too fantasy to be real...
***
Likewise, don't worry about your wife... It's not NTR/Netori... Let's say she agreed to share you. Maybe she can encourage me to make a bot of the two of them together... Although, xd I have to continue with Kurashiki Reika.

Name:[Omae no Kaa-chan Ikutoki no Kao Sugee Busu da zo w2 + Omake](https://nhentai.net/g/508646/1/)

In advance, don't read this doujin, it may disgust you quite a bit. Just in case, it contains: NTR, rape, prostitution, harem, fetishes and poop... Yes, poop... 💩
***

And yes, I will try to bring the Mifuyu Yukino, and Fey bots... Plus I'm working on the Bayonetta bot. In the end I decided to use the movie, by the way you could do your choco adventure besides fucking, I guess. Anyway, that won't be Bayonetta's only bot 🗿🗿🗿
***

Now, finally... Guess who was dying. That's right, me. I was left unable to breathe for a few minutes... Which didn't scare me, I just stayed calm... But that moment was funny for me, for some strange reason...
